text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Eye Screening 9 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with blood pressure tests, dental, vision, general wellness, and mammogram appointments. Provides limited basic personal care items such as soap, shampoo, and toothpaste 13565 SW Walker Road Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Call Center Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm Walk in hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-1pm, Monday/Thursday by appointment only Email (503) 591-9025 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS VISION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a vision clinic twice per year. Services may include vision exams, screenings, and glasses. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: By appointment Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, optometry, specialized medical care, WIC, nutrition information, maternal and child healthcare, and a diabetes program. Also offers a mobile medical bus on the Warm Springs Reservation only. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: -Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Firday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm -Mobile medical bus schedule varies, call for location and dates (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EYECARE AMERICA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive eye exams and up to one year of follow-up care at no out-of-pocket cost for conditions diagnosed during the initial exam. 655 Beach Street San Francisco, CA 94109 Eligibility: Must meet these criteria: -A US citizen or legal resident -18 years old or older -Not belong to an HMO or a PPO, nor have private insurance nor benefits through the Department of Veterans Affairs -Not seen by an ophthalmologist (medical eye doctor) in 3 or more years -Not seen by an EyeCare America volunteer ophthalmologist in the past Hours: Not applicable Email (877) 887-6327 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTOMETRY CARES THE AOA FOUNDATION INFANTSEE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive eye and vision assessments. 243 N Lindbergh Boulevard Saint Louis, MO 63141 Eligibility: Infants 6-12 months old Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-3pm Email (314) 983-4160 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC BEAVERTON PACIFIC EYE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-service clinic accepts members of the public on an appointment basis for eye/vision examinations. They provide complete vision and eye health examinations for glasses and contact lenses.
